description.overview: The Sealyham Terrier is a rare Welsh breed that was once the darling of Hollywood celebrities.
description.temperament: Sealyhams are calmer than most terriers. They're friendly, adaptable, and make excellent companions.
description.health: Prone to eye problems (lens luxation) and deafness.
description.exercise: Moderate exercise needs. Daily walks and play.

not_for: Those wanting a highly active dog
verdict.summary: Rare, calm terriers perfect for apartments. Sealyhams are friendlier and more adaptable than most terriers.
